SEARCH
程序包 mypakege

类 Profile

java.lang.Object
mypakege.Profile
所有已实现的接口:
Comparable<Profile>
public class Profile extends Object implements Comparable<Profile>
A Profile uniquely identifies a student by last name, first name, and date of birth. It supports comparisons by last name, then first name, then date of birth.
作者:
HIrotaku Hayashi hh635, junjie Xia jx309

    String

    Returns the string representation of the profile in the format: [First Last mm/dd/yyyy]

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Profile

      public Profile(String fname, String lname, Date dob)
      Constructs a Profile with first name, last name, and date of birth.
      参数:
      fname - the first name
      lname - the last name
      dob - the date of birth

  • 方法详细资料

    • getFname

      public String getFname()
      Returns the first name.
      返回:
      the first name

    • getLname

      public String getLname()
      Returns the last name.
      返回:
      the last name

    • getDob

      public Date getDob()
      Returns the date of birth.
      返回:
      the date of birth

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(Profile o)
      Compares this Profile with another Profile for ordering. Ordering is by last name (case-insensitive), then first name (case-insensitive), then date of birth (chronological).
      指定者:
      compareTo 在接口中 Comparable<Profile>
      参数:
      o - the other Profile to compare with
      返回:
      a negative integer if this is less than o, zero if equal, or a positive integer if greater than o

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Checks whether this Profile is equal to another object. Two profiles are equal if their first name and last name match case-insensitively and their dates of birth are equal.
      覆盖:
      equals 在类中 Object
      参数:
      obj - the object to compare
      返回:
      true if obj is a Profile with the same identifying fields; false otherwise

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the string representation of the profile in the format: [First Last mm/dd/yyyy]
      覆盖:
      toString 在类中 Object
      返回:
      the formatted string representation

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Testbed main() for Profile.compareTo(). Required by the project rubric: - 3 test cases return -1 (or negative) - 3 test cases return 1 (or positive) - 1 test case returns 0
      参数:
      args - command-line arguments (not used)
